title: lepidium montanum var. spathulatum
intro: Lepidium montanum var. spathulatum, also known as Western peppergrass or pepperwort, is a plant species that belongs to the mustard family and is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function, making it a valuable remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lepidium montanum var. spathulatum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
